Usage (Arbitrum Sepolia):   forge script script/Register.s.sol \\     --rpc-url arbitrum_sepolia \\     --broadcast \\     -vvvv Required env vars (see .env.example):   PRIVATE_KEY              \u2014 operator private key (must be authorised for the provision)   RPC_DATA_SERVICE_ADDRESS \u2014 deployed RPCDataService address   PROVIDER_ADDRESS         \u2014 on-chain service provider address   ENDPOINT                 \u2014 public HTTPS endpoint, e.g. https://rpc.example.com   GEO_HASH                 \u2014 ~4-char geohash, e.g. \"u1hx\" (London)   PAYMENTS_DESTINATION     \u2014 address that receives GRT fees (0x0 = use provider address)   CHAIN_IDS                \u2014 comma-separated chain IDs to serve, e.g. \"1,42161\"   CAPABILITY_TIER          \u2014 1, 2, or 3 (default:
